---
title: 'Topic: what makes Ash leave OR, how does he meet E...'
date: '2015-01-22T18:16:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'It''s Author Fun'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '5933963248113118473'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/It_s Author Fun/feed.atom'
---

Topic: what makes Ash leave OR, how does he meet Eta?
